payload.answer: Aborted ingestion due to unresolved URL syntax error (missing ':' after 'https' and invalid domain). No durable memory created.

entity_resolution.reason: malformed_url_due_to_punctuation_error; no valid resource exists to reference

memory_cards.statement: Failed to fetch article at malformed URL (punctuation/format error: missing ':' after 'https' and invalid domain structure). Network error: 404 (Mock).

details: No memory cards or citations generated.

repair_options: Correct URL format (e.g., 'https://example.com/missing') and retry fetch.
Flag as potential data corruption if intentional.
